scripts.pre:push: pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm run checks
scripts.checks: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint
scripts.ecr:login: aws ecr get-login-password --profile $AWS_PROFILE --region $AWS_REGION | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin $(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text --profile $AWS_PROFILE).dkr.ecr.$AWS_REGION.amazonaws.com
scripts.ecr:create-if-needed: aws ecr describe-repositories --repository-names trusted-output-app --profile $AWS_PROFILE --region $AWS_REGION || aws ecr create-repository --repository-name trusted-output-app --profile $AWS_PROFILE --region $AWS_REGION
scripts.docker:tag: docker tag trusted-output-app:latest $(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text --profile $AWS_PROFILE).dkr.ecr.$AWS_REGION.amazonaws.com/trusted-output-app:latest
scripts.docker:push: docker push $(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text --profile $AWS_PROFILE).dkr.ecr.$AWS_REGION.amazonaws.com/trusted-output-app:latest
scripts.deploy:ecr: pnpm run docker:build && pnpm run ecr:login && pnpm run ecr:create-if-needed && pnpm run docker:tag && pnpm run docker:push
